source_pr.title: plan: fix a topn bug
source_pr.body:
If a function exists in order by lists, it shouldn't push down anything. But we pushed a single limit into table scan , which may cause a bug about correctness. This PR fixes it.
@coocood @shenli @zimulala @tiancaiamao @XuHuaiyu

symptoms: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by id + 1 desc limit 1 ") (executor/executor_test.go)
failure_signature: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by id + 1 desc limit 1 ") (executor/executor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: r = tk.MustQuery("select id from select_order_test order by id + 1 desc limit 1 ") (executor/executor_test.go)
